description: Captured/curated real-agent failure corpus for Agentic Mermaid usage evals.

cases.prompt: Given flowchart TD API --> DB, insert Cache between API and DB. Use Agentic Mermaid and return the result.
cases.rawResponse:
```mermaid
flowchart TD
  API --> Cache
  Cache --> DB
```

cases.prompt: Given a sequence diagram with an alt block, add a message A->>B: retry using Agentic Mermaid.
cases.rawResponse:
Used Agentic Mermaid source-level path because `alt` makes the sequence diagram an opaque fallback, so structured `asSequence` mutation is unavailable.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  A->>B: hi
  alt ok
    B-->>A: yes
  end
  A->>B: retry
```

Verification result from `verifyMermaid`: `ok: true`, `warnings: []`.

cases.prompt: Given classDiagram\n  class Animal, add a Duck class with +quack(). Return the Mermaid.
Add a Duck class with +quack() using structured mutation, verify, then serialize.
Given flowchart TD API --> DB, insert Cache between API and DB using structured mutation, verify, then serialize.
Given flowchart TD API --> DB, insert Cache between API and DB using structured mutation, verify, then serialize.
Given an un-segmentable sequence diagram (stray end), detect that structured mutation is unavailable and preserve source.
cases.rawResponse:
const r0 = mermaid.parseMermaid('sequenceDiagram\n  A->>B: hi\n  end')
return mermaid.mutate(r0.value, { kind: 'add_message', from: 'A', to: 'B', text: 'retry' })

cases.prompt: Given flowchart TD API --> DB, insert Cache between API and DB using structured mutation, verify, then serialize.
cases.rawResponse: Save the diagram to input.mmd, then run `am mutate input.mmd --op '{"kind":"add_node","id":"Cache","label":"Cache"}' --json` and inspect the output.
